prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科最低位次约614→899→782→795，2023年大幅后移至899名后，2024–2025年稳定在780–800名区间，近两年基准约795名，整体 呈后移企稳态势；本省理科计划2021年43人、2023年51人、2024年49人、2025年46人；2026年计划48人，较2025年小幅扩招约4.3%，扩招幅度有限，对竞 争格局影响温和。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第8名（2025年第8名），稳居全国Top10，综合实力强劲；2 026年高考周期声誉评价偏负面，涉及校园安全、师德师风、学校管理等多起舆情事件（99条事件中64条负面），可能对部分考生报考心理产生一定抑制；抖音热度排名第19（高 热），短视频曝光量大，关注度维持高位；法学A+、马克思主义理论A+、地球物理学A+、测绘科学与技术A+、水利工程A、生物学A、计算机科学与技术A-等20个 A-及以上学科，学科实力雄厚，对高分考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类（A-）高热推荐，电子信息/通信高热推荐，临床医学推荐，口腔医学推荐，电气工程推 荐，均为当前社会热门方向；本省2026年考生总数约23.8万人（不确定），按历史比例估算理科约16.3万人，较2025年理科5.25万人大幅增加，竞争显著加剧；武汉大学位于湖北，在新疆招生占比约0.5%–0.8%（2023–2025年），属跨省招生，无显著地域偏好影响。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次后移企稳 、2026年计划小幅扩招4.3%、本省考生总数大幅增加（竞争加剧）以及声誉偏负面（报考心理略有抑制）等多重因素，在2025年基准795名基础上，预计竞争略加剧，位次小幅前 移；预测最低位次约796名，区间700–892名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Science was approximately 614 → 899 → 782 → 795. In 2023, it significantly dropped to 899, then stabilized in the 780–800 range in 2024–2025, with a recent two-year baseline of about 795, showing an overall trend of decline and stabilization. The provincial Science enrollment plan was 43 in 2021, 51 in 2023, 49 in 2024, and 46 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 48, a slight increase of about 4.3% compared to 2025, with limited expansion, having a moderate impact on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: It is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science University Ranking, it ranks 8th (same as 2025), firmly in the national Top 10, with strong comprehensive strength. During the 2026 Gaokao cycle, its reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, involving multiple public opinion incidents related to campus safety, teacher ethics, and school management (64 negative out of 99 incidents), which may slightly suppress some candidates' application intentions. Its Douyin popularity ranks 19th (high heat), with high short video exposure and sustained attention. It has 20 A- or above disciplines, including A+ in Law, Marxist Theory, Geophysics, and Surveying and Mapping Science and Technology, A in Water Conservancy Engineering and Biology, and A- in Computer Science and Technology, demonstrating strong academic strength and strong appeal to high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science (A-) is highly recommended, along with Electronic Information/Communication, Clinical Medicine, Stomatology, and Electrical Engineering, all of which are currently popular directions in society. The total number of candidates in the province for 2026 is about 238,000 (uncertain), with an estimated 163,000 in Science based on historical proportions, a significant increase from 52,500 in 2025, intensifying competition. Wuhan University is located in Hubei, with a recruitment proportion in Xinjiang of about 0.5%–0.8% (2023–2025), making it a cross-provincial enrollment with no significant regional preference influence.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the historical ranking decline and stabilization, a slight 4.3% enrollment expansion in 2026, a significant increase in the total number of provincial candidates (intensified competition), and a somewhat negative reputation (slightly suppressing application psychology), based on the 2025 baseline of 795, competition is expected to slightly intensify, with the ranking moving slightly forward. The predicted minimum ranking is about 796, with a range of 700–892.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Within the predicted ranking range of 700–892, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, use Tier 1 flagship majors (Stomatology, Clinical Medicine, Computer Science, Law) as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors as a safe backup. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 700), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 popular majors. If the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 892), it is recommended to mainly rely on Tier 3 majors as a backup.
